changes.reason: Activate one dormant valid-0DTE pin-avoid concept as an attribution probe while preserving every existing valid-0DTE routed profile. This is a full router-list replacement as required for dormant profile tests.
Enable the dormant charm-wall pin-avoid profile to test whether existing C# playbook logic can isolate tail-prone charm/pin states without tightening global vetoes or disturbing no-0DTE routing.

recommendation.expected_effect: This should produce attribution on whether dormant pin-avoid logic captures or diverts high-extension charm-wall/charm-pin risk. Best case: combined charm/pin worst MAE improves and protected pullback/squeeze throughput is unchanged. Main tradeoff is router cannibalization: it may steal profitable charm_pin_pullback_long or charm_wall_breakaway_long trades without reducing the call-wall -655.2 tail.
recommendation.label: dormant-pin-avoid-attribution-probe
recommendation.rationale: The last rejected recommendation was a duplicate charm-wall structure box, and the latest surgical extended-VWAP repair hurt score without improving worst MAE. The next non-duplicate, config-only experiment should change mechanism: use the dormant valid-0DTE charm_wall_pin_avoid_long concept to test whether existing playbook routing can separate pin-risk states that are currently mixed into profitable but tail-heavy charm profiles. This keeps one logical family, avoids global veto tightening, leaves option-confirmed profiles constrained to VALID_0DTE routing, and does not touch no-stop-loss behavior.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: run_056 shows charm_pin_pullback_long has 28 trades, $1088.2 PnL, efficient median behavior, but a -335.75 worst MAE; charm_wall_breakaway_long has 5 trades, $574 PnL, $503.6/hour, but -357 MAE. Dormant pin-avoid logic may provide attribution for the high-extension pin-risk subset without broad pruning.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Dormant Pin-Avoid Attribution Probe
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Router overlap may cannibalize profitable charm-pin or charm-wall winners, and the dormant profile may not reduce the portfolio worst MAE if the dominant tail remains call_wall_acceptance_long.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE charm/pin/wall context where active charm profiles are profitable but carry hidden MAE around pin-risk or high-extension states.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Dormant profile has positive standalone PnL or improves combined charm/pin/wall worst MAE; total net profit remains >=98% of run_044, completed trades drop <=10%, protected fast-winner retention remains >=95%, and slow_12h stays 0.
